description_long: This is a children's shampoo bottle featuring a contoured, ergonomic shape with a playful, wavy profile for easy gripping. The bottle is decorated with vibrant graphics from Disney's Big Hero 6, including prominent characters and a cityscape background. The front displays the product name 'Shampoo 2 en 1' along with the Disney and Big Hero 6 logos. The back contains product information, instructions, and a barcode, all printed in white text over the illustrated background. The cap is a simple, cylindrical white screw cap, contrasting with the colorful body. The bottle appears to be made of lightweight plastic, suitable for use in bathrooms or for carrying in bags.
description: A contoured plastic children's shampoo bottle with colorful Big Hero 6 graphics, ergonomic shape, and a white screw cap.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main Big Hero 6 characters, product name, and logos on a wavy, contoured bottle.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the bottle's narrow profile and partial continuation of the cityscape graphics.
description_view_2: Back view displays product information, instructions, and a barcode over the illustrated background.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the bottle's slimness and the edge of the main character graphics.
attribute_bottle_silhouette: short, wavy, and contoured with a narrow neck and rounded shoulders
attribute_packaging_graphics: Colorful illustrations of Big Hero 6 characters and a cityscape background
